name: Agpl.Optimization.Annealing.Solver

tagged_types.name: Object
tagged_types.code: type Object is tagged limited private;

documentation.description: The object used to perform the annealing

subprograms.name: Best_Cost
subprograms.code: function Best_Cost (This : in Object) return Cost

subprograms.name: Best_Solution
subprograms.code: function Best_Solution (This : in Object) return Solution

documentation.description: Obtain the best solution seen till moment.

subprograms.name: Current_Cost
subprograms.code: function Current_Cost (This : in Object) return Cost

subprograms.name: Current_Solution
subprograms.code: function Current_Solution (This : in Object) return Solution

subprograms.name: Current_Temperature
subprograms.code: function Current_Temperature (This : in Object) return Temperature

subprograms.name: Iterate

documentation.description:
Do an iteration, and change the temperature. See parent package for
some temperature change predefined functions.

subprograms.name: Set_Best_Solution
subprograms.code:
procedure Set_Best_Solution (This : in out Object;
                             Sol  : in     Solution)

documentation.description: If by some reason you alter it and need to replace...

subprograms.name: Set_Current_Solution
subprograms.code:
procedure Set_Current_Solution (This : in out Object;
                                Sol  : in     Solution)

documentation.description: Set the solution to be used as seed in the next iteration

subprograms.name: Set_Initial_Solution
subprograms.code:
procedure Set_Initial_Solution (This : in out Object;
                                Sol  : in     Solution)

subprograms.name: Solve

documentation.description:
Run until Timeout expires or Converge time elapses without a better
solution found or Iterations are performed.
Callback is called once every second, just in case you want to do smthing

subprograms.name: Work

documentation.description:
As previous, but doesn't require an initial solution: assumes one exists
and that everything is ready.
This allows "chunking" the computation

formals.name: Evaluate
formals.code: function Evaluate (Sol : in Solution) return Cost

documentation.description: Says how good is a solution.

formals.name: Last_Mutation
formals.code: function Last_Mutation (Sol : in Solution) return String

documentation.description:
Informative, to know mutations working well
Just returns a description of what was done.
Should be unique for the mutation class, since it is used to
aggregate stats.

formals.name: Normalize

documentation.description:
Say the probability of keeping a new solution, given the change in
costs and current temperature.
Will be compared against U[0..1]
An opaque type containing a solution.
Must undo the last mutation. Only one level of undo is required.
